source.description:
IMPORTANT: Installing this package version requires upgrading all the other Document Understanding packages to their latest version. (in case any are installed).

This includes the following packages: IntelligentOCR (>= 6.23.0), PDF (>= 3.21.0), OCR.Activities (>= 3.21.0), OmniPage (>= 1.21.0) and Vision (>= 3.14.0). On lower versions, some functionality may be missing or unexpected errors might occur.

Requires Studio 21.10.x or greater. 

This package version is compatible with UIAutomation.Activities versions that are 24.10.0 or later.

Core activities that enable the usage of a complete document processing framework, from taxonomy definition, digitization, document classification, data extraction, data validation and classifier / extractor training.

activities.description: Creates a document classification action. To be used in conjunction with the "Wait For Document Classification Action And Resume" activity to collect the results.
Creates a document validation action. To be used in conjunction with the "Wait For Document Validation Action And Resume" activity to collect the results.

activities.displayName: Wait For Document Classification Action And Resume
activities.description: Suspends the workflow until the document classification action is completed and then resumes the workflow. To be used in conjunction with the output of a "Create Document Classification Action" activity.

activities.displayName: Wait For Document Validation Action And Resume
activities.description: Suspends the workflow until the document validation action is completed and then resumes the workflow. To be used in conjunction with the output of a "Create Document Validation Action" activity.
Opens Validation Station and allows for human review of automatic clasification and data extraction, if any
Opens Classification Station and allows for human review of automatic document classification
Processes PDF and image files to obtain document object model and text version
Exports an ExtractionResults object to a DataSet containing multiple Tables, for all types of fields and values.
Data extractor for fixed template document types
